# SquareYards AI

> Your AI Interior Designer that understands your vibe, your space, and you.
> Personalized interior design plans, photoreal renders, moodboards, and a real product BOQ — in minutes.

SquareYards AI helps users transform vague ideas, room photos, inspiration images, budgets, and lifestyle preferences into personalized interior design plans with real products, visual previews, and actionable recommendations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, intent picker, before/after preview, and product story.
